title: Cherry Grove+
description: Adds variety to the new biome with dynamic models, new flowers and leaves. No OptiFine required.
body:
This is a resource pack that adds more variety to the new biome, now with more dynamic models that add life to the environment and new types of flowers and leaves that harmonize with the general color of the biome! you do not need optifine to use the pack.

[Patreon-exclusive features: bushy leaves.](https://www.patreon.com/posts/cherry-grove-1-6-79738432)
